zh.lifeSummary: 當Julia Ann Le Targe於大約1475年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親Edward Le Targe26歲，母親Jeanne Calieux16歲。她於大約1494年與John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield在英國英格蘭薩默塞特蘭福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1565年之後在英國英格蘭薩默塞特蘭福德，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特蘭福德 布德維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julia Ann Le Targe于大约1475年出生在法国諾門迪时，她的父亲Edward Le Targe26岁，母亲Jeanne Calieux16岁。她于大约1494年与John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield在英国英格兰薩默塞特蘭福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1565年之后在英国英格兰薩默塞特蘭福德，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特蘭福德 布德維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Targe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Search  , with unexpected voicing of the final consonant.
German: possibly a variant of Sarke, a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with saro ‘armor’ (of a knight).

variants.name: Search
meanings: English (Middlesex and Surrey): from the Middle English personal name Serich, Sarich, Sirich, representing a coalescence of two Old English personal names, Sǣrīc (from sǣ ‘sea’ + rīce ‘power, powerful’) and Sigerīc (from sige ‘victory’ + rīce ‘power, powerful’). The form of the surname has been altered under the influence of Old French surreis ‘southerner’ (see Surridge ).

nameMeanings.name: Julia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman family name   Julius .  A woman called Julia is mentioned in Paul's Epistle to the Romans (Romans 16:15), and the name was borne by numerous early saints. Its frequency increased with the vogue for classical names in the 18th century, and it continues to enjoy considerable popularity, although the recent introduction of   Julie   to the English-speaking world has reduced this somewhat. Well-known bearers include the British actress  Julia Foster  (  b. 1941 ) and American actress  Julia Roberts  (  b. 1967  as  Julie Fiona Roberts ).

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: When Julia Ann Le Targe was born about 1475, in Normandy, France, her father, Edward Le Targe, was 26 and her mother, Jeanne Calieux, was 16. She married John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield about 1494, in Langford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1565, in Langford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Langford Budville, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julia Ann Le Targe est née environ 1475, à Normandie, France, son père, Edward Le Targe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jeanne Calieux, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield environ 1494, à Langford, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1565, à Langford, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Langford Budville, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Julia Ann Le Targeが約1475年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Edward Le Targeは26歳，母Jeanne Calieuxは16歳であった。約1494年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトラングフォードでJohn Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1565年以後にイギリスイギリスソメルセトラングフォードで死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトラングフォード ブドヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Julia Ann Le Targe(이)가 대략 1475년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Le Targe(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne Calieux(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 랭퍼드에서 John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 랭퍼드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 랭퍼드 버드빌에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield aproximadamente 1494, em Langford, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julia Ann Le Targe родилась около 1475 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Edward Le Targe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne Calieux, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield около 1494 г. в местности лангфорд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1565 г. в местности лангфорд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности лангфорд будвилл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
